summary: This is a brief transitional post where Joel Spolsky explains his recent silence on the blog, attributing it to intense work at Fog Creek Software preparing for the beta release of CityDesk. He announces his intention to write about the design and development process behind CityDesk, linking to the first installment of that series.
key_points: Joel had been quiet on his blog due to focused product development work at Fog Creek
CityDesk was being prepared for its beta release and was considered Fog Creek's flagship product
Joel planned to document and share the design and development process behind CityDesk
money_quotes: I've been rather quiet lately on this weblog — mainly because we've been working so hard at Fog Creek getting ready for the beta of CityDesk, our flagship product.
key_insight: This is a placeholder announcement post with no substantive argument, serving only to flag an upcoming series on CityDesk's development.
